name: It Will Become Scenic When Dawn Comes
overview: In love with all things cinema, Ko Gyeom attends an audition, where he meets Kim Mubee. As he slowly develops feelings for her, he tries to get closer.

name: Why So Serious
overview: Five years after vanishing, Gyeom reappears as a critic before Mubee, now a director. But his nonchalant attitude stirs complicated feelings in her.

name: Keep Your Friends Close, But Your Enemies Closer
overview: Living in close proximity, Mubee and Gyeom become obsessed with each others' every move. Hong Si-jun and Son Ju-a struggle to reconcile their past.

name: It's Not Your Fault
overview: After Mubee and Ju-a partner on a new movie, Ju-a seeks Si-jun's help for the film's music. Gyeom faces a dark consequence from one of his reviews.

name: No One Can Prepare You for the Love and the Fear
overview: Gyeom's confession preoccupies Mubee, even though she tries to ignore it. Meanwhile, Ju-a keeps visiting Si-jun, hoping he'll compose the film's music.

name: Happy Ending Is Mine!
overview: Mubee gives in to Gyeom's persistence — until he fails to show up one night. Si-jun and Ju-a become trapped together, leading to a frank exchange.

name: Thanks for the Adventure Now Go Have a New One
overview: Ko Jun tries to hide a big secret, sparking Gyeom's suspicions. Ju-a and Si-jun reflect on the past — and where they went wrong.

name: All You Need Is Love
overview: As Gyeom pretends to be okay, his loved ones worry for his well-being. But soon, Mubee helps him find the courage to confront his feelings.

name: We Were Like Strangers Who Knew Each Other Very Well
overview: Si-jun and Ju-a wrestle with their emotions as they question their future. Meanwhile, Mubee's film encounters a hurdle, leaving her feeling at a loss.

name: Life Is a Beautiful, Magnificent Thing, Even to a Jellyfish
overview: Shedding their past, Mubee and Gyeom resolve to live their life to the fullest. Si-jun and Ju-a make a final decision about their relationship.
